name: Developer Skill
description: Developer workflow for ALL coding tasks. Handles: init project, security review, Claude Code CLI with retry, planning, GitHub tracking, branching, verification, PR creation. CLI error tracking with auto-log and retrospect analysis. Code health audit.

name: My Devices
description: Điều khiển thiết bị của user qua SSH và CUA (Computer-Use Agent). SSH-first, CUA-fallback. Chạy lệnh, check thông tin, mở app, screenshot, GUI control, transfer file.

name: Skill Manager
description: Create, analyze, or improve OpenClaw skills — full lifecycle management with orchestrator pattern support, complexity scoring, and multi-round review.

name: Code Task Planner
description: Plan and break down coding tasks — features, bug fixes, refactors, API changes. Analyzes codebase, clarifies requirements, defines acceptance criteria, test strategy, and implementation steps. Default output: GitHub issue. Supports Jira, Monday, Trello.

name: Research Skill
description: Deep web search, scraping, browser automation, and information gathering with structured output. Handles static pages, SPAs, JS-rendered content, form interactions, and anti-bot bypasses via Playwright/Scrapling.

name: Memory Consolidation
description: Cognitive memory consolidation — daily dream cycles that scan daily logs, extract knowledge, consolidate into structured long-term memory.

name: Document Skills
description: Create professional documents: PDF, Word (DOCX), Excel (XLSX), PowerPoint (PPTX). Template fill, charts, Vietnamese diacritics support.

name: image-gen-skill
description: Generate professional images: logo, banner, product photography, model+product, mockup
